resources.string: How do I install a mod?

1. Open the mod card.
2. Tap a file from the list.
3. Press Download and wait.
4. Tap Install — Minecraft will open and import the pack.
5. Switch the pack on inside the world you want to play.
How do I install a texture pack or a skin?
The flow is the same as for a mod. After import, enable it in Minecraft under Global Resources, Behavior Packs, or in the Profile menu for skins.
The mod won\'t install. What should I check?

• Check that the mod supports your Minecraft version — the compatible range is shown at the bottom of every mod card.\n• Free up some space on your device.\n• Close Minecraft and this app, then try again.
I get a \"file corrupted\" error

Most often the download was interrupted.
• Delete the mod and try again.
• Make sure your connection is stable during the download.
• If it still fails, switch from mobile data to Wi-Fi (or the other way around).
I installed a mod but I don\'t see it in Minecraft
• Open World Settings and turn the pack on manually.\n• Enable Experimental Features for that world.\n• Try a fresh world with the pack already attached.
How do I enable Experimental Features in Minecraft?
In Minecraft go to Create New / Edit World → Experiments and turn on the toggles your mod needs (commonly Holiday Creator Features, Custom Biomes, Beta APIs). Restart the world after enabling.
Can I use mods in multiplayer?
It depends on the server. Most servers require every player to have the same packs installed — if the host allows the mod, you\'re good.
The game lags after installing a mod

Some mods are heavy on weaker devices.
• Close other apps running in the background.
• Lower render distance and graphics quality in Minecraft.
• Try a lighter mod from the same category.
Which Minecraft versions are supported?
We target the latest Bedrock release and a few previous versions. Each mod card lists the exact compatible range.
Will you add new mods?
Yes — fresh mods and updates land on the catalog regularly. Pull down on the catalog to refresh and see the latest additions.
How do I know when a mod is updated?
Each file in the mod card shows its version. Update notifications are on our roadmap — for now, refresh the catalog from time to time.
Are these mods safe?
Every mod we publish is reviewed by hand. No viruses, no hidden trackers, no shady payloads inside the .mcpack files.
Do I need an account to use the app?
No. Everything works without registration — favorites and downloads stay on your device.
Do I need internet?
Only to browse and download. Anything already imported into Minecraft works fully offline.
The app says \"No internet\" but my connection works
Usually that means our servers are temporarily under maintenance — we already know about it. Try again in a few minutes.
What happens to my mods if I uninstall this app?
Nothing. Once a mod is imported into Minecraft it lives there — uninstalling our app doesn\'t remove anything from the game.
Something is broken. Where do I report it?
Open the mod card and tap \"Not working\". Or use the Feedback tab on the Propose screen — describe the problem and we\'ll look into it.
I made a mod — how can I share it?
Tap the button below to jump to the submission screen. Drop a link or attach the file and we\'ll review it.
Submit a mod
Why does the app show ads?
Ads keep the app free and let us update mods without a paywall. We try to keep them out of your way — no popups while you\'re playing.
